title: Handle a Critical Lab Value
description: A lab technician verifies a result that is in the 'critical' range and must immediately notify the patient's care provider.

tasks.description: Identify a lab result that has been flagged by the LIS as a critical value.
tasks.expected_outcome: Technician sees a prominent alert for the critical result.

tasks.description: Follow the hospital's critical value protocol by calling the ordering provider or the nurse on the patient's unit.
tasks.expected_outcome: Technician makes a phone call to communicate the result directly.

tasks.description: Document the critical value notification in the LIS, including who they spoke to and the time of the call (read-back).
tasks.expected_outcome: The communication is documented, providing an audit trail that the critical result was properly communicated.
